PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='python.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'uvicorn|main:app|xingce' } | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "kill $\($_.ProcessId\): $\($_.CommandLine\)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }; Write-Output "done")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "import sqlite3;c=sqlite3.connect\('xingce.db'\);print\('库内题数:',c.execute\('select count\(*\) from question'\).fetchone\(\)[0],'| 资料分析:',c.execute\('select count\(*\) from question where material_id>0'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)")
